routes.sample: Toggle Sidebar Search modules, actions or press ⌘K ⌘ K V API Keys Securely manage keys to authenticate your external integrations. Generate New Key Keep your keys private API keys provide full access to your WhatsApp workspace. Never commit these keys to version control or share them in client-side code. If a key is compromised, revoke it immediately. Curl Example Send a message using your API key curl -X POST https://api.wapi.app/v1/messages \ -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY" \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -d '{ "to": "919876543210", "type": "text", "text": "Hello platform!" }' Documentation Explore our robust API reference Our API allow you to programmatically manage conver
